name: Model Selection UI
summary: Frontend dropdown for selecting and switching AI models
goals: Provide a model selection dropdown with model capabilities and costs

specDetail.description: A ModelDropdown component that displays available AI models with their capabilities, context window sizes, and cost information. Allows the user to switch models during a session.

parameters.name: onModelChange
parameters.description: Callback when a new model is selected

parameters.name: disabled
parameters.description: Whether switching is disabled during active execution

constraints: Must show model name, provider, context window, and cost per token
Must confirm before switching during an active execution
Must preserve conversation context when switching models mid-session

acceptanceCriteria.when: the user opens the model dropdown and selects a different model
acceptanceCriteria.then: the session switches to the new model for subsequent messages

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
